cenas.dalle_prompt: A hula hoop is on the floor. A dog is being lured with a treat to walk through the hoop while it's flat on the ground. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, showing the dog getting comfortable with the hoop in a non-threatening way.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The hula hoop is now held just an inch off the ground. The dog is lured to step through it. The trainer rewards the dog for going through. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A low-angle shot that emphasizes the tiny height of the hoop, showing how the difficulty is increased gradually.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The hoop is raised a few inches. The dog now has to do a small hop to get through. The trainer is very encouraging. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera captures the small hop in slow-motion, celebrating the first jump.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The hoop is now at a more impressive height. The trainer says "Pula!" and the dog leaps gracefully through the center of the hoop. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A cinematic, slow-motion shot from the side, capturing the dog in mid-air as it sails through the hoop. A "Wow!" graphic appears.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog jumping through a hoop made of the owner's arms, showing the ultimate trust and fun. Text overlay: "Através do Arco da Confiança". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: An emotional and impressive shot. The text appears in a font that suggests partnership and connection.
